note: Windows CI workflow now installs .NET 10 SDK, restores/builds the existing ChickenScratch.slnx (not the missing .sln), drops invalid solution-level Platform=x64 override, and builds both H-2 and H-6 harnesses in the final step. All referenced csproj files exist in the working tree. CI runs on windows-latest so XAML compiler is available; macOS-host limitation only affects local validation, not CI.
